title: 24pk ASR Outdoor 3 1/4 Inch x 1 Inch Tarp Camping Secure Grip Awning Clamps
description:
The ASR Outdoor Awning Clamps will come in handy whether you're hiking, camping, or improving your home. They feature a secure grip with ridges to lock in place, and will adjust to various thicknesses. These clamps are great for holding down tarps, whether you're camping out or constructing a temporary waterproof cover. They will attach to the edge of the tarp to provide an extra tying option. They measure in at 3 1/4" long and 1" wide, and have a black durable plastic body. Make sure to take them with you wherever you need to use a tarp! Note: Awning clamps come in packs of 24.
